Notes: Goldey-Beacom's first game since Dec. 21 ... Lightning's 4th loss in last 5
games ... Nyack ends four-game losing streak ... Warriors also snap three-game
skid against GBC ... Meghan Richards (NYACK) has season-high 11 rebounds ...
Audrey Matteson (NYACK) ties season high with 6 assists.
Game.Officials: Kelly Callahan (R),  Terry Glass,  Karen Pammer
